items.name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
items.desc: Wood-grilled rustic bread, vine-ripened tomato, garlic, basil, finishing oil.

items.name: Calamari Fritti
items.desc: Lightly floured calamari, lemon, calabrian chili aioli, marinara.

items.name: Antipasto della Tavola
items.desc: Prosciutto di Parma, mortadella, salami toscano, fresh mozzarella, marinated olives, peperoncini, grilled bread.

items.name: Polpette di Casa
items.desc: Three slow-simmered meatballs in our 48-hour sugo, fresh ricotta, basil.

items.name: Carciofi alla Romana
items.desc: Whole artichokes braised in white wine, garlic, mint, olive oil — served warm.

items.name: The Casaburo
items.desc: Crisp romaine, slivered red onion, sliced green onion, romano, golden croutons, dashes of red pepper, finished tableside with our peppery house dressing. Served with bottomless fresh-baked bread.

items.name: Caprese di Stagione
items.desc: Fresh mozzarella di bufala, heirloom tomato, basil, fleur de sel, aged balsamic, finishing oil.

items.name: Wedge Italiano
items.desc: Crisp iceberg, gorgonzola dolce, candied pancetta, marinated red onion, soft-boiled egg, basil green-goddess.

items.name: Panzanella d'Estate
items.desc: Torn ciabatta, sun gold tomato, cucumber, capers, red onion, basil, red wine vinaigrette.

sections.name: Paste
sections.sub: All pastas hand-rolled in house. Choose: cavatelli, mostaccioli, capellini, tortellini, linguini, rigatoni, fettuccine, spaghetti, ravioli or lasagna.

items.name: Linguine Tutto Mare
items.desc: Shrimp, scallops, baby clams, capers, in a delicate tomato-cream sauce. Tom Casaburo's plate.

items.name: Funghi al Forno
items.desc: A luxurious cream sauce with porcini, cremini, shiitake, garlic, white wine, romano, your choice of pasta and one additional vegetable.

items.name: Lasagna della Nonna
items.desc: Layers of fresh pasta, ricotta, slow-cooked beef sugo, mozzarella, romano, basil. The whole sheet still bubbling when it lands.

items.name: Fettuccine Alfredo
items.desc: Hand-cut fettuccine, butter, fresh cream, aged romano. Add chicken +6 · shrimp +9.

items.name: Linguine con Vongole
items.desc: Baby clams (or pre-shelled on request), garlic, white wine, parsley, Calabrian chili, finishing oil.

items.name: Rigatoni alla Bolognese
items.desc: Slow-simmered Bolognese — beef, veal, pork, soffritto, San Marzano, milk, a long Sunday afternoon.

items.name: Ravioli di Ricotta
items.desc: Fresh sheep's-milk ricotta, lemon zest, brown butter, sage, toasted hazelnut, romano.

items.name: Spaghetti Pomodoro
items.desc: San Marzano slow-simmered with garlic, basil, finishing oil. The first dish on the first day.

items.name: Margherita di Casa
items.desc: San Marzano, fresh mozzarella di bufala, hand-torn basil, finishing oil.

items.name: Diavola
items.desc: Spicy soppressata, San Marzano, mozzarella, calabrian chili honey.

items.name: Quattro Formaggi
items.desc: Fresh mozzarella, gorgonzola dolce, fontina, romano, fresh thyme, no sauce.

items.name: Pizza Vegetariana
items.desc: Roasted bell pepper, cremini, red onion, baby spinach, sweet sungold tomato, mozzarella.

items.name: Prosciutto e Rucola
items.desc: Mozzarella, San Marzano, prosciutto di Parma added after firing, baby arugula, lemon, parmigiano shaved.

items.name: Salsiccia & Friarielli
items.desc: House fennel sausage, garlicky broccoli rabe, fresh mozzarella, calabrian chili.

items.name: Pollo al Griglia
items.desc: Half free-range chicken on the wood-fired rotisserie, charred Italian vegetables, lemon, rosemary, finishing oil.

items.name: Salmone Caccia
items.desc: Atlantic salmon, lemon-caper brown butter, charred broccolini, soft polenta.

items.name: Ossobuco di Vitello
items.desc: Veal shank slow-braised in white wine, soffritto, San Marzano, gremolata, saffron risotto Milanese.

items.name: Bistecca alla Fiorentina
items.desc: 28-day dry-aged 32oz ribeye over hardwood, sea salt, lemon, finishing oil, charred radicchio. Carved tableside.

items.name: Vitello al Marsala
items.desc: Pounded veal, cremini, marsala demiglace, mascarpone, hand-cut tagliatelle.

items.name: Tiramisù della Casa
items.desc: Espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream, cocoa, a dusting of bittersweet chocolate.

items.name: Cannoli Siciliani
items.desc: Crisp shells filled to order with sweetened sheep's-milk ricotta, candied orange, pistachio.

items.name: Panna Cotta al Limone
items.desc: Soft-set lemon-vanilla cream, macerated berries, candied lemon zest.

items.name: Affogato
items.desc: Single shot of espresso poured tableside over a scoop of vanilla bean gelato.

sections.name: Vino & Caffè
sections.sub: Glass · half carafe · bottle. Full list at the table.

items.name: Chianti Classico
items.desc: Bright cherry, leather, dust. The first pour for the bread basket.

items.name: Barbera d'Asti
items.desc: Soft tannins, sour cherry, picnic-friendly. Drinks like dinner with friends.

items.name: Barolo
items.desc: Rose petal, tar, structured. The bottle for an ossobuco night.

items.name: Primitivo di Manduria
items.desc: Plum, fig, easy. House favorite by the half-carafe.

items.name: Vermentino
items.desc: Sea spray, lemon zest, mineral. Built for the linguine vongole.

items.name: Espresso
items.desc: Pulled to order. Double on request.

items.name: Cappuccino
items.desc: After 11 a.m., we look the other way.

items.name: Amaro Casa
items.desc: A few fingers of amaro, served at room temperature, after dinner.
